message:
chore(cargo): refresh lockfile for insta and fcp-audit dev-deps

Lockfile entries were out of sync with Cargo.toml after recent commits
that introduced new test-side dependencies:

- fcp-registry now lists insta as a dev-dep for the golden-artifact
  tests added in d17eec21 (test(fcp-registry): add registry golden
  artifacts).
- fwc picked up fcp-audit as a dev-dep for the signed audit-chain
  verification tests added in 7a6c4599 (fix(fwc): verify signed audit
  chains in audit verify).

Only Cargo.lock was regenerated; no code changes. This avoids a noisy
diff on the next cargo invocation and keeps CI reproducible.
